attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
XAAS_NRT.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
XAAS_NRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
XAAS_NRT.DSCNT_APPLD_AUTOMATICALLY_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_CHANGE_REASON_CD,
XAAS_NRT.BK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_APPLICATION_MTHD_CD,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_APPLIED_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.SK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT,
XAAS_NRT.SS_CD,
XAAS_NRT.DISCOUNT_ROLE,
XAAS_NRT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
XAAS_NRT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
XAAS_NRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
XAAS_NRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
XAAS_NRT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQUEST_ID_INT,
XAAS_NRT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQ_VER_NUM_INT,
XAAS_NRT.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_ID_INT,
XAAS_NRT.RU_DSCNT_APLD_POST_TRM_PRD_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.ADJSTD_PER_QTY_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.LIST_LINE_TYPE_CD,
XAAS_NRT.DSCNT_APPLD_LVL_CD,
XAAS_NRT.DSCNT_VAL_PER_QTY_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.DSCNT_PCT,
XAAS_NRT.DSCNT_MODIFIER_KEY,
XAAS_NRT.PROMOTION_CD,
XAAS_NRT.PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
XAAS_NRT.CONTEXT_CD,
XAAS_NRT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR,
XAAS_NRT.SK_LIST_HEADER_ID_INT,
XAAS_NRT.SK_LIST_LINE_ID_INT,
XAAS_NRT.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_TRM_MTHS_CNT,
XAAS_NRT.IS_TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APPLD_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.APPLICABLE_AT_RENEWAL_FLG,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_TYPE_NAME,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_GROUP_TYPE_NAME,
XAAS_NRT.MNTLY_SUBSCR_PR_ADJ_CR_USD_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.PRICE_ADJ_RECURRENCE_TYPE_CD,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_CD,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DTM,
XAAS_NRT.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DT,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DTM,
XAAS_NRT.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DT,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_CATEGORY_ACTION_CD,
XAAS_NRT.CREDIT_CD,
XAAS_NRT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
XAAS_NRT.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_LCL_AMT,
XAAS_NRT.START_TV_DTM,
XAAS_NRT.END_TV_DTM,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN ( NSOLPA.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSOLPA.START_TV_DTM IS NULL  )THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
  FROM              
 (select * from $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_NRT_TV where ss_cd = 'OPL' 
 and end_tv_dtm = '3500-01-01 00:00:00') XAAS_NRT
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,START_TV_DTM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TV  where ss_cd = 'OPL' GROUP BY 1,2 )NSOLPA
   ON XAAS_NRT.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=NSOLPA.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
  AND XAAS_NRT.START_TV_DTM=NSOLPA.START_TV_DTM
  WHERE XAAS_NRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >=(SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_OPL')
